narrative:
Precinct Morgan B (precinct in Scioto County) has 662 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.5 percentage points.
